tasks.title: Setup server dependencies and ESM configuration
tasks.description: Add 'fastify' to package.json dependencies and ensure tsconfig.json has 'module': 'ESNext' and 'moduleResolution': 'bundler' or 'node' for ESM support.

tasks.title: Extend GwrkConfigSchema for server and parallelism
tasks.description: Modify src/utils/config.ts to add 'server' (port, host) and 'parallelism' (local, cloud) sections to GwrkConfigSchema as defined in DM-002.

tasks.title: Implement PID management utility
tasks.description: Create src/server/pid.ts with writePid, readPid (with process-alive check), and removePid functions as defined in the server.md contract.

tasks.title: Implement Fastify server bootstrap and lifecycle
tasks.description: Create src/server/index.ts with startServer (binds port, writes PID, /health endpoint) and stopServer (graceful shutdown) as defined in server.md.

tasks.title: Implement server CLI commands
tasks.description: Create src/commands/server.ts with 'start' and 'stop' subcommands. Register 'server' command group in src/cli.ts.

tasks.title: Implement SystemMonitor resource sampling
tasks.description: Create src/server/monitor.ts with SystemMonitor class implementing sample() and isThrottled() using 'os' and 'df' as defined in monitor.md.

tasks.title: Implement status API route
tasks.description: Create src/server/routes/status.ts implementing GET /api/status returning the SystemStatus data model (DM-003). Register route in src/server/index.ts.

tasks.title: Implement status CLI command
tasks.description: Create src/commands/status.ts to query the daemon's status API and display results. Register in src/cli.ts.

tasks.title: Define shared domain types
tasks.description: Create src/server/types.ts and export Zod schemas and types for DispatchRecord, DispatchAttempt, DispatchStatus, SystemStatus, and SandboxInfo (DM-001, DM-003).

tasks.title: Implement Git Manager for phase branches
tasks.description: Create src/server/git-manager.ts with createPhaseBranch, mergePhaseBack, isClean, and hasConflicts as defined in git-manager.md.

tasks.title: Implement Context Compiler and sandbox injector
tasks.description: Create src/server/context.ts with compileContext (aggregates rules/spec/plan/tasks) and writeContextToSandbox functions as defined in context.md.

tasks.title: Setup Docker dependencies and ignore patterns
tasks.description: Add 'dockerode' and '@types/dockerode' to package.json. Create/update .dockerignore to exclude node_modules and .git from sandbox builds.

tasks.title: Create gwrk-sandbox Dockerfile
tasks.description: Create Dockerfile.sandbox based on bookworm-slim with Node.js LTS, Git, and gh CLI installed. Set WORKDIR to /workspace.

tasks.title: Implement Docker sandbox manager
tasks.description: Create src/server/sandbox.ts with createSandbox, destroySandbox, destroyAllSandboxes, and listSandboxes using dockerode as defined in sandbox.md.

tasks.title: Implement dispatch persistence
tasks.description: Create src/server/persistence.ts with persistDispatch function for append-only logging to .gwrk/dispatches.jsonl (DM-001).

tasks.title: Implement core Dispatch Queue engine
tasks.description: Create src/server/dispatch.ts with DispatchQueue class implementing enqueue() and processNext() logic (throttle/maxClones check).

tasks.title: Implement dispatch retry and escalation logic
tasks.description: Add handleCompletion to src/server/dispatch.ts with 3x retry on same backend followed by escalation to next backend as defined in dispatch.md.

tasks.title: Implement dispatch API routes
tasks.description: Create src/server/routes/dispatch.ts with POST /api/dispatch, GET /api/dispatch/:id, and GET /api/dispatch/queue. Register in src/server/index.ts.

tasks.title: End-to-end system integration and wiring
tasks.description: Connect SystemMonitor to DispatchQueue for auto-throttle. Create src/server/integration.test.ts to verify full lifecycle: POST -> Sandbox -> Complete -> Merge.
